use_cases: Product image zoom on e-commerce detail pages
Interactive document or map zoom functionality
Detail viewing in SaaS dashboards or portfolios
ai_summary: An interactive view magnifier component with smooth drag-to-zoom and scale animations powered by Framer Motion spring physics. Features configurable max scale, zoom level percentage display, and callbacks for scale state changes. Works on both desktop (drag zoom) and mobile (pinch zoom) via pointer events.
